title: phaseolus vulgaris var. coffeinus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. coffeinus, also known as the kidney bean, is a variety of the common bean (Phaseolus vulgaris) that is native to the Americas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as menstrual cramps and digestive issues. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. coffeinus include its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers. The herbal preparation of this plant is typically made into a tea or infused oil, and it has been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat a range of health issues.
